title: UnderWater Pressure
description: This mod adds water pressure mechanic
body:
UnderWater Pressure is a server-side mod that adds semi-realistic water pressure. The deeper a player goes underwater, the stronger the pressure becomes. Staying under high pressure for too long results in instant death. Time until death, enabling/disabling the mechanic, and debug mode are configurable via Config. Armor protection against pressure is also available: you can configure single items (e.g., turtle helmet) or full armor sets. Creative and spectator mode players are immune to pressure.

![Showcase of a pressure mechanic with critical pressure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5799b13472dc5e9b8b930d687b2a322575333915.gif)
